original_query: with e2 as (  select empno, case when true then deptno else null end as deptno  from emp)select empno,  deptno in (select deptno from e2 where empno < 20) as dfrom e2;
rewritten_query:
SELECT empno, deptno IN (SELECT deptno FROM emp WHERE empno < 20) AS d
FROM emp;

rewrite_suggestion.produced_suggestion: Removed redundant CASE statement 'CASE WHEN true THEN deptno ELSE null END' as it always evaluates to deptno
Eliminated unnecessary CTE by directly referencing the emp table in both the main query and subquery
Fixed syntax error by adding space between 'AS d' and 'FROM'
